prompts.label: Prompts
prompts.caption: Reusable instructions you can insert into any conversation

mcp.label: MCP Servers
mcp.caption: External tools and data sources, synced to your agents

prompts.emptyDescription: Save reusable instructions and insert them into any task conversation with /prompt.

editor.promptPlaceholder: The instructions sent to the agent when you insert this prompt…
editor.hint: Keep it agent-neutral so it works across every provider.
editor.saveError: Couldn't save this prompt. Check the title and try again.

skills.noSearchMatch: No skills match “{{query}}”. Use New skill to create one.

editor.nameError: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens; start with a letter or number.
editor.descriptionPlaceholder: What this skill helps the agent do
editor.descriptionHint: Grex generates a starter SKILL.md and links it into your agents. You can edit it afterwards.
editor.saveError: Couldn't save this skill. Check the name and try again.

mcp.noSearchMatch: No servers match “{{query}}”. Use Custom MCP to add your own.

editor.saveError: Couldn't save this server. Check the fields and try again.

syncDialog.title: Sync MCP servers to agents
syncDialog.description: Grex will write these changes to each agent's native config file. Unrelated entries are left untouched.
syncDialog.unsupported: {{name}} — not supported by this agent, skipped
syncDialog.syncError: Sync failed. Your config files were not changed.

mcp.chrome-devtools: Inspect, debug, and profile pages in Chrome.
mcp.github: Manage repositories, issues, pull requests, and code.
mcp.gitlab: Manage GitLab projects, issues, and merge requests.
mcp.postgres: Read-only access to a PostgreSQL database.
mcp.sqlite: Query and inspect a local SQLite database.
mcp.supabase: Query and manage your Supabase database and project.
mcp.mongodb: Explore collections and run queries on MongoDB.
mcp.redis: Read and write keys in a Redis instance.
mcp.neon: Manage serverless Postgres branches on Neon.
mcp.filesystem: Read and write files within allowed directories.
mcp.memory: A persistent knowledge graph the agent can recall.
mcp.fetch: Fetch a URL and convert it to clean markdown.
mcp.context7: Up-to-date documentation and code examples for libraries.
mcp.deepwiki: Ask questions about any public GitHub repository.
mcp.brave-search: Web and local search via the Brave Search API.
mcp.firecrawl: Crawl and scrape websites into clean markdown.
mcp.figma: Read Figma designs and translate frames into code.
mcp.cloudinary: Manage, transform, and deliver media assets.
mcp.sanity: Query and edit content in your Sanity dataset.
mcp.airtable: Read and write records in Airtable bases.
mcp.linear: Manage Linear issues, projects, and team workflows.
mcp.notion: Read and update Notion pages and databases.
mcp.asana: Manage tasks, projects, and workspaces in Asana.
mcp.atlassian: Access Jira and Confluence from Atlassian Cloud.
mcp.stripe: Payments, customers, invoices, and financial data.
mcp.slack: Send messages and read channels in your workspace.
mcp.discord: Send and read messages in Discord channels.
mcp.sentry: Search, query, and debug errors and issues.
mcp.grafana: Query dashboards, metrics, and alerts in Grafana.
mcp.cloudflare: Cloudflare docs, Workers, and platform tools.
mcp.netlify: Create, deploy, and manage Netlify sites.
mcp.railway: Manage Railway projects, services, and deploys.

skills.pdf: Read, fill, split, merge, and create PDF files.
skills.docx: Create, read, and edit Word (.docx) documents.
skills.canvas-design: Create polished visual art as PNG and PDF.
skills.algorithmic-art: Generative art with p5.js and seeded randomness.
skills.brand-guidelines: Apply consistent brand colors and typography.
skills.webapp-testing: Test local web apps end-to-end with Playwright.
skills.skill-creator: Create, improve, and measure agent skills.
skills.code-reviewer: Review a diff for bugs, edge cases, and quality.
skills.commit-message: Write clear Conventional Commits from staged changes.
skills.debugger: Systematically find the root cause of a bug.
skills.figma-to-code: Turn Figma designs into production-ready UI.
skills.github-pr-review: Address review comments on a GitHub PR.
